variables.input: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == "AgriTech Corp" | fields json.companyName | dedup json.companyName

fetch bizevents 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName
| fields json.journeyType | dedup json.journeyType
fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter json.companyName == "AgriTech Corp" | fields json.stepName | dedup json.stepName

fetch bizevents
| fields json.serviceName, json.companyName, json.journeyType
| summarize count(),by:{json.companyName, json.journeyType, json.serviceName}
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType)
| dedup json.serviceName
| fields json.serviceName = lower(json.serviceName)
| filter isNotNull(json.serviceName)

smartscapeNodes PROCESS
| lookup [smartscapeNodes SERVICE | fields id, name], sourceField:name, lookupField:name, prefix:"svc."
| lookup [timeseries cpu = avg(dt.process.cpu.usage), by:{dt.smartscape.process}], sourceField:id, lookupField:dt.smartscape.process, fields:{cpu}
| filter isNotNull(cpu)
| fieldsAdd LowerService = lower(name)
| filter in(LowerService, $Service)
| fields id
| dedup id

0.content:
# Crop Planning Dashboard
## AgriTech Corp | Crop Planning Journey | Business Observability
**Data Signals:** 🔧 Services
---

3.title: 📈 Total Journey Volume
3.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize TotalEvents = count()

4.title: ✅ Journey Success Rate
4.query:
fetch bizevents 
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType 
| summarize total = count(), successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false) 
| fieldsAdd success_rate = round((toDouble(successful) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:2)

5.title: 💰 Total Revenue
5.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize revenue = sum(additionalfields.orderTotal)

6.title: ❌ Total Errors
6.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize errors = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true)

7.title: 🎯 Success Rate
7.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize total = count(), successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false) | fieldsAdd rate = round((toDouble(successful) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:1)

8.title: ⚡ Error Rate
8.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize total = count(), errors = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true) | fieldsAdd rate = round((toDouble(errors) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:1)

10.title: 📊 Journey Step Metrics
10.query:
fetch bizevents 
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType 
| summarize 
    OrdersInStep = count(), 
    SuccessRate = round((toDouble(countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false)) / toDouble(count())) * 100, decimals:2),
    AvgTimeInStep = avg(additionalfields.processingTime),
    ErrorsInStep = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true),
    ErrorRate = round((toDouble(countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true)) / toDouble(count())) * 100, decimals:2), 
    by: {json.stepName} 
| sort OrdersInStep desc

11.title: 📈 Volume Over Time
11.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | makeTimeseries successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false), failed = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true), bins:30

12.title: 📊 Events by Step
12.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize count = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort count desc | limit 10

13.title: 🐝 Step Health Overview
13.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize total = count(), successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false), by: {json.stepName} | fieldsAdd success_rate = round((toDouble(successful) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:1) | fields json.stepName, success_rate

15.title: 💼 Journey Events (Filtered)
15.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | filter in(json.stepName, $Step) | summarize total = count()

16.title: 💰 Revenue (Filtered)
16.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | filter in(json.stepName, $Step) | summarize revenue = sum(additionalfields.orderTotal)

17.title: 💵 Avg Order Value
17.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | filter in(json.stepName, $Step) | summarize avg = avg(additionalfields.orderTotal)

18.title: ⏱️ P90 Response Time
18.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | filter in(json.stepName, $Step) | summarize p90 = percentile(additionalfields.processingTime, 90)

19.title: 📈 Events Over Time (Filtered)
19.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | filter in(json.stepName, $Step) | makeTimeseries events = count(), bins:30

20.title: 📊 Events by Step (Filtered)
20.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize count = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort count desc | limit 10

22.title: ⚡ Step Performance
22.query:
fetch bizevents 
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType 
| summarize Events = count(), AvgTime = avg(additionalfields.processingTime), ErrorRate = round((toDouble(countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true)) / toDouble(count())) * 100, decimals:2), by: {json.stepName} 
| sort Events desc

23.title: 📋 SLA Compliance (< 5s)
23.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize TotalEvents = count(), WithinSLA = countIf(additionalfields.processingTime < 5000), by: {json.stepName} | fieldsAdd ComplianceRate = (WithinSLA / TotalEvents) * 100

24.title: 🕐 Hourly Activity Pattern
24.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | fieldsAdd hour = toString(getHour(timestamp)) | summarize Events = count(), by: {hour} | sort hour asc

25.title: 📊 SLA Target Compliance
25.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize total = count(), within_sla = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false) | fieldsAdd sla_rate = round((toDouble(within_sla) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:1)

27.content: *No additional business metrics found in the bizevent data for this journey. Run a journey simulation to populate business metrics.*

29.title: 🗺️ Journey Activity Heatmap (Step × Hour)
29.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | fieldsAdd hour = formatTimestamp(timestamp, format: "HH") | summarize count = count(), by: {json.stepName, hour} | sort hour asc

30.title: 🌍 Event Distribution by Region
30.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.region) | summarize Events = count(), by: {additionalfields.region} | sort Events desc

31.title: 📋 Recent Journey Events
31.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | sort timestamp desc | limit 20 | fields timestamp, json.stepName, json.journeyStatus, additionalfields.region, additionalfields.deviceType, additionalfields.channel

33.title: 🕐 Hourly Activity Pattern
33.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | fieldsAdd hour = toString(getHour(timestamp)) | summarize Events = count(), by: {hour} | sort hour asc

34.title: 📊 Event Volume Distribution
34.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize count = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort count desc

35.title: ⏱️ Processing Time Trend
35.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | makeTimeseries avg_processing = avg(additionalfields.processingTime), p90_processing = percentile(additionalfields.processingTime, 90), bins:30

36.title: 📉 Success vs Failure Trend
36.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | makeTimeseries success = countIf(json.journeyStatus == "Success"), failed = countIf(json.journeyStatus == "Failed"), bins:30

37.title: 📐 Processing Time Range (Min / Avg / Max)
37.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | makeTimeseries min_time = min(additionalfields.processingTime), avg_time = avg(additionalfields.processingTime), max_time = max(additionalfields.processingTime), bins:30

38.title: 📊 Processing Time Distribution
38.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.processingTime) | fields processingTime = additionalfields.processingTime

40.title: Latency_p50
40.query:
timeseries latency_p50 = median(dt.service.request.response_time),
           by:{dt.entity.service}
           | fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = entityName(dt.entity.service),
          latency_p50
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p50) desc
| filter in(service, $Service)
| limit 100

41.title: Latency_p90
41.query:
timeseries latency_p90 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time, 90),
           by:{dt.entity.service}
          | fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = lower(entityName(dt.entity.service)),
          latency_p90
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p90) desc
| filter in(service, $Service)
| limit 100

42.title: Latency_p99
42.query:
timeseries latency_p99 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time, 99), 
           by:{dt.entity.service}
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = lower(entityName(dt.entity.service)),
          latency_p99
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p99) desc
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| limit 100

---
